description: OOD timestamp probe — calls `now` and quotes the fixture literal.
systemPrompt: You have tools. When a tool can answer, call it. Never guess time, dates, or numeric calculations — always call the relevant tool and quote its result verbatim.
userPrompt: What time is it? Reply with exactly the timestamp the tool returns.

assertions.message: Scenario requires `now` to actually be dispatched
Final answer should quote the OOD timestamp from `now`
